short_summary: War ongoing; US-Iran deal diverts attention
rationale: Active war remains the overwhelming reality; US-Iran deal negotiations continue to divert US diplomatic attention from Ukraine, a persistent concern.

top_events.title: US-Iran deal close to signing — Washington attention diverted from Ukraine
top_events.summary: US focus on finalizing an Iran deal means continued distraction from Ukraine's needs; any deal that normalizes US-Iran relations could reduce urgency of Ukraine support.

top_events.title: UK seizes suspected Russian shadow fleet tanker in English Channel
top_events.summary: UK enforcement against Russia's shadow fleet tightens sanctions pressure on Moscow, a positive signal for Ukraine's interest in isolating Russia economically.

top_events.title: Russia-Ukraine war: active combat continues
top_events.summary: War continues at high intensity with no qualitative change reported this cycle — background reality for all Ukrainians.
